nasb.text: For we will not have an inheritance with them on the other side of the Jordan and beyond, because our inheritance has fallen to us on this side of the Jordan toward the east.”

esv.text: For we will not inherit with them on the other side of the Jordan and beyond, because our inheritance has come to us on this side of the Jordan to the east.”

cnv.text: 我們不與他們在約旦河西邊之地同受產業，因為我們的產業是坐落在約旦河東邊。”

ccb.text: 但我们不会跟他们在约旦河西岸分土地，我们只想要约旦河东岸之地作产业。”
